§6Fission Physics: Fission Bombs§f

§aCross the nuclear threshold and unlock the ultimate force of environmental devastation!§f

The §9Trinity§f addon for NuclearCraft introduces subcritical spheres, fission bomb cores, and remote detonation mechanics. As you master isotopic separation and heavy metal purification, you will construct nuclear fission devices capable of leveling entire chunks.

§6Fission Core Mechanics§f:
All fission bombs share the same 3×3 crafting blueprint:
§b• Center§f: 1× §bFission Bomb Core§f (determines isotope: §bUranium-233§f, §bU-235§f, §bNeptunium-237§f, §bPlutonium-239§f, etc.).
§b• Surrounding§f: 8× §bCompression Charges§f (crafted from Lead, TNT, and Baratol).
§b• Salted Variants§f: Craft a fission bomb using a §bSalted Core§f instead of standard cores to generate §cheavy radioactive fallout§f upon detonation, permanently contaminating a massive zone.

§6Detonation & Safety§f:
§cNever stand close to a nuclear bomb during detonation!§f Standing too close will result in instant vaporization. Always detonate from a safe distance using a §bNuclear Detonator§f:
1. §9Sneak + Right-click§f the bomb with the detonator in hand to lock the target coordinates.
2. Retreat to a safe, shielded bunker.
3. §9Right-click§f the detonator to remotely trigger the explosion.

§eTip§f: Begin your nuclear program by crafting a Subcritical U-235 Sphere — subcritical spheres are the precursor components that teach you the isotopic chemistry of fission fuel without producing weaponizable material.
